property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: verify_SearchProductDDT[iphone, iphone, Valid](1)

failure.message: Expected page for valid keyword but it was not present: iphone expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected page for valid keyword but it was not present: iphone expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
